title: Winmau Blade X & Blade 6 Series Dartboards - Professional PDC Official Tournament Dart Board, Ultra-Thin Wire System, High-Density Sisal Construction
features: Enhanced Durability: Made from top-quality sisal with self-healing properties, this board resists wear and marks, maintaining a pristine surface and consistent scoring, even after countless intense practice sessions or competitive games.

Max Scoring Potential: Innovative ultra-thin wiring reduces deflections, while the laser-cut steel number ring rotates 10 times at 36° per turn, evenly distributing wear and maximizing scoring opportunities across the entire dartboard.

Balance & Control: Designed with optimal density control, the bristle board provides consistent bounce-back, reduced wear in key scoring areas, and exceptional balance and control, helping players refine precision with every throw.

Perfect Setup Every Time: Includes Rota-Lock leveling system and Spirit Master for flawless installation, ensuring the dartboard is perfectly aligned, letting players focus on gameplay and hit their targets with total confidence.

Tournament-Ready Performance: Built to official PDC specifications, this dartboard delivers exceptional precision, durability, and high-performance play, making it ideal for competitive professionals, aspiring players, and dedicated enthusiasts alike
description: The Most Advanced Dartboard in the World and the New Official Dart board of the PDC. The Blade X is engineered for elite performance, delivering unrivalled scoring consistency and exceptional durability, backed by a 5 year warranty. The world’s most advanced dart board construction, featuring layered sisal density to reduce surface resistance for improved dart penetration, while compressing the inner core to absorb kinetic energy-dramatically enhancing durability making it the ultimate next-generation choice for blade 6 dartboard fans seeking the most advanced upgrade. To complement the design, it can be purchased alongside a Blade X surround for a complete professional setup. An ultra-slim wiring system increases the surface area of the scoring zones, with a 60-degree angled wire design that guides darts into key scoring areas, dramatically reducing bounce-outs and deflection. The deepest sisal bed on the planet maximises impact absorption, reduces bounce-outs, and increases scoring potential through deeper dart penetration and enhanced board stability. Blade X delivers exceptional self-healing performance, preserving a pristine playing surface and significantly extending the darts board lifespan. Designed to withstand elite-level competition, Blade X is rigorously tested by the world’s top professionals. Premium-grade African sisal, selected for strength and purity, delivers unrivalled fibre density exceeding 5.5 million fibres per board—creating the most consistent and responsive playing surface ever produced. Advanced carbon fibre bonding penetrates the sisal line, reinforcing a high quality base layer to deliver unmatched strength, long-term durability, and superior structural integrity. A precision laser-cut steel number ring offers effortless 360° rotation—no removal required. Integrated steel-thread mounting with Rota-Lock levelling ensures fast installation & enhanced stability.
